title: neobartlettia platyphylla
intro: Neobartlettia platyphylla, also known as Mexican gold poppy or platyphyllus, is a flowering plant in the poppy family that is native to Mexico. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Neobartlettia platyphylla include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
